purpose: committed processed snapshots for the passive market instability extension notebook
data_quality_note: ETF volume times return is a flow-pressure proxy, not official ETF flow. Estimated market-cap weights are not official S&P 500 weights.
passive_share_source: paper calibration constants for Haddad baseline and Brightman-Harvey sensitivity
equity_snapshot_source: yfinance price-volume snapshot; latest yfinance market caps where available; synthetic placeholders for missing names
